page1:
Aaj bhi tujhe chahte hain dil se ❤️
Har pal bas tera hi khayal aata hai 💭

Bas ek tu hi zaroori hai zindagi me 💕
Tere bina sab adhura lagta hai 😔

Chand se bhi haseen lagti hai tu 🌙
Dil har pal tera hi deewana hai ❤️

Dil me sirf tera hi naam hai 💖
Tujhse hi meri pehchaan hai 😊

Ek tu hi hai jo sab samajhta hai 💕
Baaki duniya to bas dikhawa karti hai 😌

Fiza me bhi tera hi ehsaas hai 🌸
Dil ko bas tera hi intezaar hai ❤️

Guzarta har pal tera intezaar karta hai 🕰️
Dil sirf tujhe hi pyar karta hai 💖

Har khushi tere naam kar di 😊
Zindagi bhi tere naam kar di ❤️

Ishq tera meri aadat ban gaya 😍
Dil tera hi deewana ban gaya 💕

Jab se tu mila hai sab badal gaya 💖
Zindagi ka har pal haseen ho gaya 😊

Khwabon me bhi tu hi aata hai 💭
Dil tujhe hi chahata hai ❤️

Lamha lamha tujhme kho gaya 😍
Dil tera hi ho gaya 💕

Mohabbat sirf tujhse hai ❤️
Dil har pal tera hi rahta hai 💖

Nazar sirf tujhe hi dhundti hai 👀
Dil tera hi intezaar karta hai 💕

Pal pal tujhe yaad karta hoon 💭
Dil sirf tujhe hi chahta hai ❤️

Qismat se mila hai tu mujhe 💖
Isliye itna pyara lagta hai 😊

Raat bhar tera hi khayal aata hai 🌙
Dil bas tujhe hi chahata hai ❤️

Saath tera sabse khaas hai 💕
Tu hi meri har aas hai 😊

Tere bina sab adhura lagta hai 😔
Tu hi mera sapna lagta hai 💖

Umeed sirf tujhse hai ❤️
Dil ko bas tera hi intezaar hai 💕

Vaada hai tera saath kabhi na chhodenge 🤝
Har pal tujhe hi chahenge ❤️

Waqt bhi ruk jaye tere liye ⏳
Dil sirf tera hi rahega 💖

Xtra kuch nahi chahiye zindagi me 😍
Bas tu hi kaafi hai mere liye ❤️

Yaadein teri dil me basi hain 💭
Har pal tu hi yaad aata hai 💕

Zindagi ka sabse haseen hissa tu hai 😊
Dil sirf tera hi hua hai ❤️
page2:
Aaj bhi teri yaad rulati hai 😢
Dil ko tanha chhod jaati hai 💔

Bas itna hi rishta reh gaya hai 😔
Tu yaad aata hai par paas nahi 💭

Chup rehna hi behtar lagta hai 🤐
Dard sabko samajh nahi aata 💔

Dil tod kar muskurate ho tum 🙂
Hum ro kar bhi chup rehte hain 😢

Ek waqt tha jab sab tha 💭
Ab sirf yaadein reh gayi hain 💔

Faasle badhte gaye dheere dheere 😔
Aur hum akela ho gaye 💔

Guzar gaya wo waqt bhi 😢
Jab tu mera sab kuch tha 💭

Har khushi adhoori lagti hai 😔
Jab tu saath nahi hota 💔

Itna bhi kya badal gaye tum 😢
Jo pehchaan na sake hume 💭

Jab se tu door gaya hai 😔
Dil bas udaas rehta hai 💔

Kisi se kya shikayat kare 😢
Apne hi badal gaye 💭

Lamhe bhi ab bojh lagte hain 😔
Teri yaadon ke bina 💔

Mujhe chhod kar khush ho tum 🙂
Aur hum toot kar bhi chup hain 😢

Na jaane kyu itna yaad aate ho 💭
Jab ki tumhare liye kuch bhi nahi 💔

Pal bhar me sab khatam ho gaya 😢
Jo kabhi apna tha 💭

Qismat bhi ajeeb khel khelti hai 😔
Jo chahte hain wahi door hote hain 💔

Raat bhar neend nahi aati 😢
Teri yaadein sone nahi deti 💭

Sab kuch hote hue bhi 😔
Dil akela sa lagta hai 💔

Tere bina jeena seekh liya 😢
Par khush rehna nahi 💭

Udaasi meri aadat ban gayi 😔
Khushi ab parayi lagti hai 💔

Vaada kiya tha saath rehne ka 🤝
Par tumne hi tod diya 💔

Waqt ke saath sab badal gaya 😢
Bas dard wahi reh gaya 💭

Xtra kuch nahi chahiye ab 😔
Bas sukoon chahiye dil ko 💔

Yaadon me hi jee rahe hain 😢
Haqeeqat me sab khatam hai 💭

Zakhm dil ke bharte nahi 😔
Bas chupana seekh liya hai 💔

Zindagi ne sikha diya hai 😢
Apno par bhi bharosa na karo 💭
